Hi, my name is

Dinesh Lal

MSc Cyber Security graduate passionate about protecting digital assets through ethical hacking, penetration testing, and vulnerability assessment.

[Your Photo Here]

01.

About Me

about.txt

> I am a passionate cybersecurity professional with an MSc in Cyber Security from London South Bank University. My journey in cybersecurity is driven by a deep curiosity for understanding how systems work and how to protect them.

> With hands-on experience in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and network security, I specialize in identifying security weaknesses before malicious actors can exploit them.

> I hold industry-recognized certifications including Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) from EC-Council, and I continuously expand my knowledge in emerging threats and defensive strategies.

>When I'm not hunting for vulnerabilities, you'll find me participating in CTF competitions, contributing to security research, or exploring the latest tools in the cybersecurity landscape.

MSc Cyber Security

London South Bank University

Certified Ethical Hacker

EC-Council

Focus

Penetration Testing

Specialty

Network Security

03.

Featured Projects

Web Application Security Assessment

Conducted comprehensive security assessment of a web application, identifying critical vulnerabilities including SQL injection and XSS flaws. Provided detailed remediation recommendations.

OWASPBurp SuiteSQL InjectionXSS

Network Penetration Testing

Performed internal network penetration test for a corporate environment. Discovered misconfigured services, weak password policies, and network segmentation issues.

NmapMetasploitWiresharkActive Directory

Vulnerability Management System

Developed automated vulnerability scanning and reporting system using Python and open-source tools. Integrated with ticketing system for efficient remediation tracking.

PythonNessus APIAutomationReporting

Wireless Security Audit

Executed wireless network security assessment including WPA/WPA2 cracking attempts, rogue access point detection, and guest network isolation testing.

Aircrack-ngWiFi SecurityRogue APWPA2
